descriptions.chart-selector-skill: Select the most appropriate chart type by reading the dongDesign chart wiki rules, capability matrix, and chart-specific guidance.
descriptions.chart-builder-skill: Generate wiki-compliant chart design plans and component structures from a selected chart type, data fields, and design-language rules.
descriptions.dongDesignChart: Guide single-Markdown Figma or design agents to create editable dongDesign Chart visuals while preserving core visual rules and allowing enhancements only where the wiki has no explicit constraint.
descriptions.dashboard-planner-skill: Plan business dashboard information architecture, chart combinations, and reading paths using the dongDesign chart wiki.
descriptions.chart-refactor-skill: Refactor an existing chart while preserving its intent, improving structure, hierarchy, visual consistency, and maintainability.
descriptions.g2-codegen-skill: Generate AntV G2 chart code from a chart-builder handoff while following dongDesign adapter, token, and self-check rules.
descriptions.echarts-codegen-skill: Generate ECharts chart options or components from a chart-builder handoff while following dongDesign adapter, token, and self-check rules.
descriptions.chart-engine-switcher-skill: Migrate chart implementations between G2, ECharts, and related engines while preserving wiki-defined design intent.
descriptions.code-snippet-builder-skill: Create reusable chart code snippets and examples from wiki-backed chart component and adapter rules.
descriptions.visual-auditor-skill: Audit chart visuals against dongDesign chart wiki rules and produce structured visual review and improvement handoff packets.
descriptions.chart-style-optimizer-skill: Review, optimize, and regenerate same-size chart visuals according to dongDesign chart wiki and component rules.
descriptions.chart-appropriateness-reviewer: Review whether a chart type correctly matches business intent, data structure, and dongDesign chart-selection rules.
descriptions.code-review-skill: Review chart code against dongDesign adapter, token, implementation, and maintainability rules.
descriptions.wiki-maintainer-skill: Maintain dongDesign chart wiki structure, references, dependencies, and governance consistency.
descriptions.doc-scaffold-skill: Create or complete wiki document skeletons according to dongDesign document-governance rules.
descriptions.file-path-finder-skill: Locate the right dongDesign chart wiki file path for a requested rule, component, pattern, or maintenance task.
descriptions.sync-planner-skill: Plan synchronization and publication work for dongDesign chart wiki content across repository, pages, and AI workflows.
descriptions.dependency-checker-skill: Check dongDesign chart wiki document references, skill dependencies, naming consistency, and unresolved links.
descriptions.design-spec-to-wiki-skill: Convert design-spec content from Figma, Zero, Relay, or similar sources into dongDesign chart wiki Markdown.
descriptions.data-dashboard-skill: Orchestrate data-dashboard planning, chart selection, chart building, code generation, and review workflows.
descriptions.campaign-analysis-skill: Orchestrate campaign-analysis dashboards and reports with funnel, trend, audience, product, and channel views.
descriptions.business-report-visualizer: Convert business diagnosis Markdown reports into structured Report IR, narrative visual configuration, and renderable handoff assets.
